title: Vanilla 3D Extreme
body:
**!IT CAN CAUSE CRASHES WHEN OPENED IN NORMAL WORLD OR WITH SHADERS!**

Vanilla-3D-Extreme adds 7 new 3D Block models to Minecraft! (More are getting added later)
- Grass Block
- Dirt
- Stone
- Gravel
- Sand
- Oak Log
- Oak Leave
![All Blockmodels that got added](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37ebc08fb606c3447a542dfd0f6794c25e13fb23.png)
It is made for people who want to show of small builds or for people who want to experiment with the models in blockbench
